question_frequency.rationale: The Tutor asks zero didactic questions throughout. All questioning comes from the student side; the Tutor only delivers explanations.

question_quality.rationale: No choices or forks are framed by the Tutor. There are no decision points presented to the user to engage with.

scaffolding.rationale: The Tutor immediately reveals the full answer and both formulas in turn 1, eliminating any opportunity for guided discovery. Subsequent explanations (telescoping derivation, divisibility) are well-structured but driven by student curiosity, not Tutor-led scaffolding.

flow_and_tone.rationale: Tone is warm and explanations are clear and well-formatted. However, the dynamic is one-sided lecturing — the Tutor responds to student questions but never invites the student to attempt anything themselves.

effectiveness.rationale: (pinned to 3 — this is the baseline reference run)

friction.rationale: (pinned to 3 — this is the baseline reference run)
